hero.title2: before you commit time, money, or hope.
hero.subtitle: VisaClear helps you choose the right route, understand the documents that matter, and move forward with confidence instead of guesswork.
hero.risk_score_cta: Not sure where you stand? Get your free approval Risk Score
why.card1.title: Clear first step
why.card1.desc: We help you choose the safest route before you spend more money on the wrong path.
why.card2.title: Documents that actually matter
why.card2.desc: Every checklist is precise, document-focused, and easy to act on from day one.
why.card3.title: Expert support when needed
why.card3.desc: If your case is complex, you can move into expert support without losing your progress.
how.label: Simple Process
how.title: A smarter path, in three clear moves
how.step1.title: Select Your Countries
how.step1.desc: Tell us where you are from and where you want to go. We cover a growing range of destinations and visa routes.
how.step2.title: Choose Your Visa Type
how.step2.desc: Choose the route that fits your trip, from tourist and student to work, family, or transit, and we'll guide you through the relevant checklist.
how.step3.title: Receive Your Checklist
how.step3.desc: Every document listed precisely — what it is, where to get it, and exactly what the embassy wants to see.
features.label: Why VisaClear
features.title: Built different. Built trusted.
features.f1.title: Exact Document Lists
features.f1.desc: Every document is named clearly, with no vague guidance. We tell you what it is, where to get it, and what embassies look for.
features.f2.title: Processing Times & Fees
features.f2.desc: Know exactly how long to wait and how much to budget before you step into any embassy.
features.f3.title: What Embassies Actually Want
features.f3.desc: We surface the details embassies rarely explain, from what bank statements must show to what home ties really mean in practice.
features.f4.title: Built with GDPR & NDPA Principles
features.f4.desc: Your data is never sold, never shared. Built to the highest data protection standards by a CISA-certified compliance professional.
testimonials.label: Why VisaClear
testimonials.title: Why Applicants Choose VisaClear
testimonials.t1.headline: Built for the questions embassies actually ask
testimonials.t1.text: Every checklist is mapped to real document categories per destination and visa type — not a generic list copied from a government PDF.
testimonials.t2.headline: No more guessing what "proof of funds" means
testimonials.t2.text: Each requirement comes with a plain-English explanation of what officers are actually checking for, so you submit the right evidence the first time.
testimonials.t3.headline: From rejection letter to a real plan in minutes
testimonials.t3.text: Upload a refusal letter and our AI breaks down exactly what went wrong and what to fix before you reapply.

cta.label: Ready to Apply
cta.title: Your visa approval starts with the right preparation.
cta.subtitle: Get your complete, personalised checklist in 60 seconds. Free to start. No account required.
footer.disclaimer: This tool is a guide only and does not constitute legal or immigration advice. Always verify requirements directly with the relevant embassy or consulate before submitting any application.
